tests.scenario: Pricing appears before payment
tests.expected_result: The subscription cost, billing period, and all information are shown before payment.

tests.scenario: Premium features are clearly identified
tests.expected_result: Premium features can be clearly identified before any kind of payment is asked.

tests.scenario: Free user records a mood entry
tests.expected_result: The free user is able to record and save a mood entry without subscribing.

tests.scenario: Mood tracking is usable without subscription
steps: Open the app with a free account
Go to the mood tracking screen
tests.expected_result: Basic mood tracking functionality is available without requiring payment.

tests.scenario: Submitted entry remains saved after reopening app
steps: Create a mood or journal entry
tests.expected_result: The submitted entry remains available after reopening the app.

tests.scenario: Entry save process completes successfully
tests.expected_result: The entry is saved successfully without being lost.

tests.scenario: App launches successfully
tests.expected_result: The app starts successfully and reaches the main screen without crashing.

tests.scenario: Main app screen loads after startup
tests.expected_result: The app startsup successfully and remains usable.

tests.scenario: User records a daily mood entry
tests.expected_result: The mood entry is saved with the date.

tests.scenario: Mood check-in saves correctly
tests.expected_result: The selected mood is stored successfully as a daily mood entry.

tests.scenario: Mood history appears in chronological order
steps: Create mood entries on multiple dates
tests.expected_result: Past entries appear in chronological order.

tests.scenario: Previous mood records remain accessible
tests.expected_result: Older mood records remain accessible to the user.

tests.scenario: Privacy information is shown before signing up
steps: Continue until sensitive data is requested
tests.expected_result: Privacy and data handling information are shown before signup takes place.

tests.scenario: Data handling information is visible during signup
tests.expected_result: The app displays data handling information before collecting sensitive data.

tests.scenario: Support options include different communication methods
tests.expected_result: At least one communication support option is available if configured.

tests.scenario: Support options are clearly presented
tests.expected_result: Help methods are presented clearly and can be accessed by the user.

tests.scenario: Guided support exercise is available
tests.expected_result: The user can open a guided exercise for stress or anxiety support.

tests.scenario: Guided exercise includes clear instructions
tests.expected_result: The activity provides clear instructions and can be completed by users.

tests.scenario: User completes a structured checkin
tests.expected_result: The user is able to complete the structured checkin.

tests.scenario: Completed checkin is stored for later review
steps: Open the review or history section
tests.expected_result: The completed checkin is stored and available for later review.
